finding: Portfolio export appeared stuck at 94% after artifact 16/17 because the final reproducibility ZIP had no intra-artifact progress and recursively compressed the entire selected output tree
resolution: Added bounded 94-99% bundle sub-progress, portfolio-scoped candidate selection, fast compression policy, and atomic temporary ZIP replacement

finding: The final bundle could re-compress unrelated or older files under a reused publication_export directory, causing very long completion times and oversized archives
resolution: Bundle enumeration is restricted to current portfolio evidence directories and metadata instead of arbitrary recursive output-tree contents

finding: Pause/cancel was only checked between portfolio artifacts, so a user could not safely stop the long 17th ZIP step
resolution: Cancellation is now checked during bundle packing; temporary archives are removed and the first 16 committed artifacts remain resumable

finding: Standard publication export executed synchronously on the Qt GUI thread and could make the application appear frozen while writing/packing files
resolution: Moved verified publication export to a QThread worker with progress, cancellation, failure, and completion signals

finding: Median/IQR convergence calculations could emit RuntimeWarning: All-NaN slice encountered for leading evaluation-grid columns before first feasible observations
resolution: All-NaN columns are removed before nanmedian/nanpercentile in statistical, live, portfolio, and publication-evidence paths; no values are fabricated

finding: A partially written reproducibility archive could remain after interruption or failure
resolution: All publication and portfolio ZIPs are built as temporary files and atomically renamed only after successful close

finding: v3.4.2 live telemetry, IEEE-300/PYPOWER validation, unclipped reference-Q reporting, and GPU-preferred numerical scheduling had to remain unchanged
resolution: Retained v3.4.2 scientific/accelerator behavior; focused IEEE 30/57/118/300 scientific suites pass unchanged
